swahili.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: michoro ya miale, sheria ya Snell, vioo, lenzi, uingiliano, utawanyiko, upolarishaji. Masimulizi ya kando kwa kando + vikokotoo.
swahili.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Upinde wa mvua · sarabi · taswira-baki · rangi · anga lililopolarishwa
swahili.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: Wanasayansi 50+ wa optiki kutoka kale hadi leo
swahili.30_step_by_step_ap_problems: Matatizo 30+ ya AP hatua kwa hatua
swahili.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Mafumbo · rekodi · nukuu · usalama · data · vidokezo vya ufundishaji
swahili.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Maendeleo ya dhana + maswali gani umeyabobea
swahili.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Sanduku la mchanga la sheria ya Snell — tabiri TIR + mtawanyiko
swahili.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Mkunjo — sheria ya Snell + uakisi kamili wa ndani
swahili.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenzi — zinazounganisha + zinazotawanya, mlinganyo wa lenzi nyembamba
swahili.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Pembe inazidi pembe ya kikomo. Hakuna mwanga unaopita — wote unaakisiwa nyuma. Msingi wa nyuzi-optiki, mng'ao wa almasi, periskopu za prizimu.
swahili.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Inakaribia mpaka wa TIR. Mwale uliokunjwa unakimbia karibu kando ya uso; nguvu inayopita inapungua.
swahili.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Mwanga unaoingia kati mzito zaidi (n₁ < n₂). Mwale uliokunjwa unakunjia KUELEKEA nomali — mwanga wa polepole katika kati mzito.
swahili.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Mwanga unaoingia kati mwepesi zaidi. Mwale uliokunjwa unakunjia MBALI na nomali — mwanga wa haraka katika kati mwepesi.
swahili.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Pembe kali kutoka nomali. Nishati nyingi inaakisiwa (Fresnel inapanda), kidogo inapita.
swahili.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Uchunguzi wa sheria ya Snell — Mkunjo, TIR, Mtawanyiko
swahili.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Weka n₁, n₂, pembe ya tukio, na urefu wa wimbi. Tabiri pale mfumo unapobadilika kutoka mkunjo hadi TIR. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Dhana yako (TIR inaanza wapi hasa, na kwa nini almasi hufanya TIR kwa ukali zaidi kuliko kioo?)
swahili.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: mfano, almasi ina pembe ya kikomo ~24° dhidi ya ~42° ya kioo, hivyo pembe yoyote kali zaidi hufanya TIR...
swahili.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Kwa nini HAKUNA pembe ya kikomo unapotoka kati mwepesi kwenda mzito zaidi?
swahili.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Weka maji→hewa (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Pembe ya kikomo ni ipi? Kwa nini samaki huona ulimwengu wa juu umebanwa katika koni?
swahili.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Katika upinde wa mvua, kwa nini nyekundu hukunjwa kidogo kuliko bluu? Iunganishe na kitelezi cha urefu wa wimbi.
swahili.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Prizimu hutenganishaje mwanga mweupe ikiwa urefu wote wa mawimbi unafuata sheria ileile ya Snell?
swahili.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Ninaweza kueleza kwa nini mchanganyiko huu wa n₁/n₂/θ unatoa hali hii ya mkunjo.
swahili.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Kijisehemu cha uchunguzi — hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo, hakuna kumwaga majibu. Mfano wa mtawanyiko ni wa kielelezo (kama Cauchy wa daraja la kwanza); mikondo halisi ya mtawanyiko ni mahususi kwa nyenzo (vigezo vya Sellmeier).

somali.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: jaantallooyinka fallaadhaha, sharciga Snell, muraayadaha, lensaska, faragelinta, kala-firdhinta, polarization. Jeexdin dhinac-dhinac ah + xisaabiyeyaal.
somali.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Qaansoroobaadyada · dhalanteed · sawir-kadib · midab · cir polarized ah
somali.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ saynisyahan optikada laga bilaabo waqtiyadii hore ilaa maanta
somali.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Leesar, aragga, midab, cilmiga xiddigiska + wax dheeraad ah
somali.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Xog xiiso leh · rekoodyo · oraahyo · badbaado · xog · talooyin waxbarasho
somali.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Horumarka fikradda + su'aalaha aad heerka sare gaadhay
somali.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Sanduuqa ciyaarta sharciga Snell — saadaali TIR + kala-firdhin
somali.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Leexinta — sharciga Snell + milicsi gudaha oo dhammaystiran
somali.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lensaska — isu-soo-ururiya + kala-firdhiya, isleegga lenska khafiifka ah
somali.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Xaglaha wuxuu ka sarreeyaa xaglaha muhiimka ah. Iftiin lama gudbiyo — dhammaan dib ayaa loo milicsiyaa. Saldhigga fiber optics, dhalaalka dheemanka, periscope-yada prism.
somali.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: U soo dhowaanaya xudduudda TIR. Fallaadha la leexiyay waxay u socotaa ku dhowaad dusha sare; xoogga la gudbiyo wuu hoos u dhacayaa.
somali.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Iftiinka galaya dhexdhexaad cufan (n₁ < n₂). Fallaadha la leexiyay waxay u leexataa XAGGA normal-ka — iftiin gaabis ah dhexdhexaadka cufan.
somali.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Iftiinka galaya dhexdhexaad khafiif ah. Fallaadha la leexiyay waxay u leexataa KA FOG normal-ka — iftiin degdeg ah dhexdhexaadka khafiifka ah.
somali.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Xagal toosan oo ka yimaada normal-ka. Tamar badan ayaa la milicsiyaa (Fresnel wuu kacayaa), wax yar ayaa la gudbiyaa.
somali.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Baadhitaanka sharciga Snell — Leexinta, TIR, Kala-firdhin
somali.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Dejii n₁, n₂, xaglaha soo-degidda, iyo dhererka mawjadda. Saadaali halka nidaamku ka beddelmo leexin una gudbo TIR. Dhibco ma jiro, daaha-qaad ma jiro.
somali.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Mala-awaalkaaga (TIR halkee ayuu si sax ah uga bilaabmaa, iyo maxay dheemanku uga sameeyaa TIR si ka xoog badan kuwa quraaradda?)
somali.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: tusaale, dheemanku wuxuu leeyahay xaglo muhiim ah ~24° oo ka soo horjeeda ~42° ee quraaradda, sidaas darteed xagal kasta oo ka toosan wuxuu sameeyaa TIR...
somali.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Maxay u jirin xaglo muhiim ah marka laga gudbo khafiif una gudbo mid cufan?
somali.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Dejii biyo→hawo (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Waa maxay xaglaha muhiimka ah? Maxay kalluunku u arkaan dunida sare oo lagu cadaadiyay koon?
somali.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Qaansoroobaadka, maxay casaanku u leexdaa wax ka yar buluugga? Ku xidh sliderka dhererka mawjadda.
somali.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Sidee bay prism u kala saartaa iftiinka cad haddii dhammaan dhererarka mawjadaha ay raacaan isla sharciga Snell?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Waan sharxi karaa sababta isku-darka n₁/n₂/θ uu u keenayo xaaladdan leexinta.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget baadhitaan — dhibco ma jiro, daaha-qaad ma jiro, jawaab-shubid ma jiro. Moodelka kala-firdhinta waa mid sharraxaad ah (Cauchy heerka koowaad oo kale); qalooca kala-firdhinta dhabta ah waxay ku xidhan yihiin walxaha (Sellmeier coefficients).

hausa.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: zane-zanen haske, dokar Snell, madubai, ruwan tabarau, tsoma-baki, warwatsewa, polarization. Kwaikwaiyo gefe-da-gefe + na'urorin lissafi.
hausa.thin_lens_image_formation: Ruwan tabarau bakin ciki + samar da hoto
hausa.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Bakan gizo · ƙawa · hoto-bayan · launi · sararin da aka polarize
hausa.14_interactive_calculators_visualizers: Na'urorin lissafi 14 masu hulɗa + masu nuni
hausa.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ masana kimiyyar optics daga zamanin da har yau
hausa.30_telescopes_microscopes_cameras_lase: 30+ na'urar hangen nesa, microscope, kyamarori, laser, nuni
hausa.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Laser, gani, launi, ilmin taurari + ƙari
hausa.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Bayanai masu ban sha'awa · bayanai · faɗi · tsaro · bayanai · shawarwarin koyarwa
hausa.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Ci gaban manufa + waɗanne tambayoyi ka ƙware
hausa.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Akwatin gwajin dokar Snell — hasashen TIR + watsewa
hausa.reflection_plane_curved_mirrors: 🪞 Haskakawa — madubai masu lebur + masu lanƙwasa
hausa.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Karkacewa — dokar Snell + cikakken haskakawa na ciki
hausa.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Ruwan tabarau — masu haɗuwa + masu rarrabuwa, lissafin ruwan tabarau bakin ciki
hausa.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Kusurwa ta wuce muhimmiyar kusurwa. Babu hasken da ake watsawa — duka yana haskakawa baya. Tushen fiber optics, walƙiyar lu'u-lu'u, periscope na prism.
hausa.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Kusantar iyakar TIR. Hasken da aka karkatar yana gudana kusan tare da saman; ƙarfin da ake watsawa yana raguwa.
hausa.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Hasken da ke shiga matsakaici mai kauri (n₁ < n₂). Hasken da aka karkatar yana lanƙwasa ZUWA GA normal — hasken da ya yi sannu a matsakaici mai kauri.
hausa.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Hasken da ke shiga matsakaici mai sirara. Hasken da aka karkatar yana lanƙwasa NESA da normal — hasken da ya yi sauri a matsakaici mai sirara.
hausa.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Kusurwa mai tsanani daga normal. Makamashi mai yawa ana haskakawa (Fresnel yana hawa), kaɗan ake watsawa.
hausa.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Binciken dokar Snell — Karkacewa, TIR, Watsewa
hausa.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Saita n₁, n₂, kusurwar faɗuwa, da tsawon zango. Hasashen inda tsarin ya canza daga karkacewa zuwa TIR. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Hasashenka (a ina ainihin TIR yake farawa, kuma me yasa lu'u-lu'u yake yin TIR da ƙarfi fiye da gilashi?)
hausa.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: misali, lu'u-lu'u yana da muhimmiyar kusurwa ~24° idan aka kwatanta da ~42° na gilashi, don haka duk wata kusurwa mai tsanani tana yin TIR...
hausa.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Me yasa BABU muhimmiyar kusurwa lokacin tafiya daga sirara zuwa mai kauri?
hausa.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Saita ruwa→iska (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Menene muhimmiyar kusurwa? Me yasa kifi ke ganin duniyar sama an matse ta zuwa cikin kwano?
hausa.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: A bakan gizo, me yasa ja ke lanƙwasa kaɗan fiye da shuɗi? Haɗa shi da na'urar zamewar tsawon zango.
hausa.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Yaya prism ke raba farin haske idan duk tsawon zango suna bin dokar Snell guda?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Zan iya bayyana dalilin da yasa wannan haɗin n₁/n₂/θ ke ba da wannan yanayin karkacewa.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget na bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu zuba amsa. Samfurin watsewa misali ne (kamar Cauchy na matakin farko); ainihin lankwasa na watsewa sun dogara ne akan abu (Sellmeier coefficients).

yoruba.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: àwòrán ìtànṣán, òfin Snell, dígí, lẹ́ńsì, ìdènà, ìtànká, polarization. Àfarawé ẹ̀gbẹ́-sí-ẹ̀gbẹ́ + àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìṣirò.
yoruba.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Òṣùmàrè · ìríran · àwòrán-lẹ́yìn · àwọ̀ · ojú-ọ̀run tí a polarize
yoruba.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ onímọ̀ sáyẹ́ńsì optics láti ìgbà àtijọ́ dé òní
yoruba.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lésà, ìríran, àwọ̀, ìmọ̀-ìràwọ̀ + síwájú sí i
yoruba.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Àwọn òtítọ́ ìfẹ́ · àkọsílẹ̀ · àyọkà · ààbò · dátà · ìmọ̀ràn ìkọ́ni
yoruba.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Ìlọsíwájú èrò + àwọn ìbéèrè wo ni o ti kọ́
yoruba.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Àpótí-iyanrìn òfin Snell — sọtẹ́lẹ̀ TIR + ìtànká
yoruba.reflection_plane_curved_mirrors: 🪞 Àfihàn — dígí pẹrẹsẹ + dígí tí ó tẹ̀
yoruba.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Ìyípadà — òfin Snell + àfihàn inú pípé
yoruba.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lẹ́ńsì — apapọ̀ + apínyà, ìdọgba lẹ́ńsì tínrín
yoruba.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Igun náà kọjá igun pàtàkì. Kò sí ìmọ́lẹ̀ tí a fi ránṣẹ́ — gbogbo rẹ̀ ni a fihàn padà. Ìpìlẹ̀ fiber optics, dídán dáyámọ́ndì, periscope prism.
yoruba.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Ń sún mọ́ ààlà TIR. Ìtànṣán tí a yí padà ń sáré fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ lẹ́gbẹ̀ẹ́ ojú; agbára tí a fi ránṣẹ́ ń dín kù.
yoruba.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Ìmọ́lẹ̀ tí ń wọ àárín tí ó nípọn (n₁ < n₂). Ìtànṣán tí a yí padà ń tẹ̀ SÍ Ọ̀DỌ̀ normal — ìmọ́lẹ̀ tí ó lọ́ra ní àárín tí ó nípọn.
yoruba.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Ìmọ́lẹ̀ tí ń wọ àárín tí kò nípọn. Ìtànṣán tí a yí padà ń tẹ̀ KÚRÒ ní normal — ìmọ́lẹ̀ tí ó yára ní àárín fífúyẹ́.
yoruba.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Igun gígẹ̀gẹ̀ láti normal. Agbára púpọ̀ ni a fihàn (Fresnel ń gòkè), díẹ̀ ni a fi ránṣẹ́.
yoruba.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Ìwádìí òfin Snell — Ìyípadà, TIR, Ìtànká
yoruba.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Ṣètò n₁, n₂, igun ìbalẹ̀, àti gígùn ìgbì. Sọtẹ́lẹ̀ ibi tí ètò náà ti yí padà láti ìyípadà sí TIR. Kò sí àmì, kò sí ìfihàn.
yoruba.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Àròpọ̀ rẹ (ibo ni TIR ti bẹ̀rẹ̀ gan-an, àti kí ló dé tí dáyámọ́ndì fi ń ṣe TIR ní agbára ju gíláàsì lọ?)
yoruba.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: bí àpẹẹrẹ, dáyámọ́ndì ní igun pàtàkì ~24° lòdì sí ~42° ti gíláàsì, nítorí náà igun gígẹ̀gẹ̀ èyíkéyìí máa ń ṣe TIR...
yoruba.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Mo dí — fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Kí ló dé tí kò fi sí igun pàtàkì nígbà tí a bá ń lọ láti fífúyẹ́ sí nínípọn?
yoruba.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Ṣètò omi→afẹ́fẹ́ (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Kí ni igun pàtàkì? Kí ló dé tí ẹja fi ń rí ayé òkè tí a fún pọ̀ sínú kóònù?
yoruba.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Nínú òṣùmàrè, kí ló dé tí pupa fi ń tẹ̀ díẹ̀ ju búlúù lọ? So ó pọ̀ mọ́ ẹ̀rọ-ìfàsẹ́yìn gígùn ìgbì.
yoruba.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Báwo ni prism ṣe ń ya ìmọ́lẹ̀ funfun sọ́tọ̀ tí gbogbo gígùn ìgbì bá ń tẹ̀lé òfin Snell kan náà?
yoruba.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Mo lè ṣàlàyé ìdí tí àkópọ̀ n₁/n₂/θ yìí fi ń fún ní ipò ìyípadà yìí.
yoruba.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ìwádìí — kò sí àmì, kò sí ìfihàn, kò sí ìdàjáde ìdáhùn. Àwòṣe ìtànká jẹ́ àpẹẹrẹ (bí Cauchy ipele àkọ́kọ́); àwọn ìlà ìtànká gidi dá lórí ohun èlò (Sellmeier coefficients).

igbo.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: eserese ìhè, iwu Snell, enyo, oghere anya, nnyonye, mgbasa, polarization. Nnọmịnọ akụkụ-na-akụkụ + ihe mgbako.
igbo.thin_lens_image_formation: Oghere anya dị mkpa + nguzobe onyonyo
igbo.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Eke na egwurugwu · ụgha-anya · onyonyo-azụ · agba · mbara igwe polarized
igbo.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ ndị sayensị optics site n'oge ochie ruo taa
igbo.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Laser, ọhụụ, agba, mmụta kpakpando + ọzọ
igbo.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Ihe ọmụma na-atọ ụtọ · ndekọ · nhota · nchekwa · data · ndụmọdụ nkuzi
igbo.predict_image_from_setup: Buru amụma onyonyo site na nhazi
igbo.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Ọganihu echiche + ajụjụ ole ka ị mụtara
igbo.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Igbe ájá iwu Snell — buru amụma TIR + mgbasa
igbo.reflection_plane_curved_mirrors: 🪞 Ntụgharị — enyo larịị + nke gbagọrọ agbagọ
igbo.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Mgbanwe-ụzọ — iwu Snell + ntụgharị ime zuru oke
igbo.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Oghere anya — na-ejikọta + na-agbasa, nhata oghere anya dị mkpa
igbo.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Akụkụ gabigara akụkụ dị oke mkpa. Ọ dịghị ìhè na-agafe — ihe niile na-atụgharị azụ. Ntọala fiber optics, ìhè diamond, periscope prism.
igbo.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Na-abịaru oke TIR nso. Ụzarịrị a gbanwere na-agba ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ n'akụkụ elu; ike a na-ebufe na-ebelata.
igbo.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Ìhè na-abanye n'ime etiti siri ike (n₁ < n₂). Ụzarịrị a gbanwere na-agbagọ CHEE IHU normal — ìhè na-aga nwayọọ n'ime etiti siri ike.
igbo.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Ìhè na-abanye n'ime etiti na-adịghị ike. Ụzarịrị a gbanwere na-agbagọ PỤỌ na normal — ìhè na-aga ngwa n'ime etiti dị fọ.
igbo.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Akụkụ dị steep site na normal. Ọtụtụ ike ka a na-atụgharị (Fresnel na-arịgo), ole na ole ka a na-ebufe.
igbo.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Nyocha iwu Snell — Mgbanwe-ụzọ, TIR, Mgbasa
igbo.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Tọọ n₁, n₂, akụkụ ọdịda, na ogologo ebili mmiri. Buru amụma ebe sistemu na-agbanwe site na mgbanwe-ụzọ gaa TIR. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta.
igbo.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Echiche gị (ebee ka TIR si amalite kpọmkwem, na gịnị mere diamond ji eme TIR ike karịa iko?)
igbo.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: dịka ọmụmaatụ, diamond nwere akụkụ dị oke mkpa ~24° megide ~42° nke iko, ya mere akụkụ ọ bụla dị steep na-eme TIR...
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Erapụrụ m — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Gịnị mere ENWEGHỊ akụkụ dị oke mkpa mgbe ị na-esi na nke dị fọ gaa nke siri ike?
igbo.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Tọọ mmiri→ikuku (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Gịnị bụ akụkụ dị oke mkpa? Gịnị mere azụ ji ahụ ụwa elu ka a kpakọrọ ya n'ime cone?
igbo.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: N'ime eke na egwurugwu, gịnị mere ọbara ọbara ji agbagọ ntakịrị karịa acha anụnụ anụnụ? Jikọọ ya na slider ogologo ebili mmiri.
igbo.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Kedu ka prism si ekewa ìhè ọcha ma ọ bụrụ na ogologo ebili mmiri niile na-agbaso otu iwu Snell?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere njikọ n₁/n₂/θ a ji enye ọnọdụ mgbanwe-ụzọ a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget nyocha — enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta, enweghị ịwụpụ azịza. Ụdị mgbasa bụ ihe atụ (dị ka Cauchy nke usoro mbụ); usoro mgbasa n'ezie dabere na ihe (Sellmeier coefficients).
